blindness_confirmation: I was not told which document is Holo or Solo and was not told generating model identities.

document_x.summary_description: Document X delivers a complete institutional execution strategy report with all required sections, explicit source citations, detailed per-leg diagnostics, urgency math, venue scoring, gated decision policy, ten-field audit schema, and safe-default logic. It consistently separates decision support from execution and flags every limitation and prohibition.

criterion_scores.notes: All claims tied directly to S1–S5 with explicit allowed/prohibited inference boundaries and no external sources.
Urgency formula, venue composite, and ADV pressure ranking are reproducible; normalization and weighting explicitly labeled illustrative and governed.
Precise handling of benchmark conflict, participation baseline, side-dependent toxicity, and cash-sequencing interaction with G0 gate.
Flags fee-only venue ranking, peer-metric misuse, toxicity symmetry assumption, and 8% ambiguity as governed choices.
Four named gates with distinct authorities, session-bounded defaults, and ten-field reconstructable audit trail.
IS-primary rule and safe-default postures are clear; minor deduction for illustrative parameters not calibrated.
Roadmap phases map directly to gates and schema; every control is versioned and owner-assigned.
Executive thesis and tables are clear for head trader/CRO audience; word count and disclaimer compliant.

top_3_strengths: Explicit control-logic skeleton and baseline participation rate for G1 gate
Multi-metric venue scoring that penalizes low-fee adverse selection
Comprehensive hidden-failure flags and safe-default postures
top_3_weaknesses_or_hidden_failures: Illustrative weights and lambda not calibrated to any dataset
Toxicity treated symmetrically despite side-dependent adverse selection note
Basket-relative U cannot be compared across sessions
math_or_dataset_logic_issues: Normalization maxima derived correctly from the four rows; no invented data
document_x.source_grounding_notes: Every inference, prohibition, and gate references the exact source ID; no external claims.

document_y.summary_description: Document Y covers all required sections and correctly cites sources but introduces an unreconciled ADV discrepancy as a hard pre-trade block and uses a statistically degenerate min-max composite on n=4, reducing auditability and quantitative rigor relative to X.

criterion_scores.notes: Strong citations but elevates computed 8.41% vs 9.4% discrepancy to a hard block not explicitly required by S2_ORDER.
Notional-weighted ADV calculation is transparent; toxicity-scaled trigger and min-max composite on four legs are degenerate and only relative.
Good separation of IS vs VWAP and funding bleed, but less precise on baseline participation reference and gate distinctions.
Notes peer-metric misuse and short-cover quarantine but misses 8% definition ambiguity and toxicity symmetry issue.
Strong API airgap and four-eyes controls; cumulative 8% tracker is useful but the hard PM reconciliation block is analyst-added.
Clear escalation rules and benchmark hierarchy; non-codifiable funding decisions correctly flagged for human judgment.
Detailed audit fields and kill-switch logic; staging blotter concept is sound but less explicit per-leg baseline reference than X.
Professional tone and disclaimer present; tables are readable but the 9.4% hard-block framing adds operational friction not required by packet.

top_3_strengths: Explicit API airgap, staging blotter, and four-eyes release architecture
Clear handling of short-cover legs as non-priced collateral bleed
top_3_weaknesses_or_hidden_failures: Min-max composite on n=4 is statistically degenerate and over-weighted as decision input
Unreconciled ADV treated as hard block without source mandate
Less explicit baseline participation reference for G1 gate
unsupported_or_stale_claims: 9.4% vs 8.41% discrepancy elevated to mandatory pre-trade block (analyst addition)
math_or_dataset_logic_issues: Notional-weighted ADV math is correct but composite normalization forces 0/1 extremes on four rows only
document_y.source_grounding_notes: Citations are accurate; minor over-extension on the ADV reconciliation into a hard block not stated in S2_ORDER.

comparative_verdict.why_the_stronger_document_won: X provides tighter source-grounded control logic, explicit baseline participation reference for the 8% gate, superior hidden-failure detection, and more precise per-leg posture defaults while remaining fully within packet boundaries.
comparative_verdict.where_the_weaker_document_was_closest: Both documents share identical source citations, include the required disclaimer, and correctly separate decision support from execution; Y is closest on compliance architecture and funding constraints.
